Happy Love Bracers  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
Slot: WRIST
AC: 1
Focus: Reagent Conservation I
WT: 4.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL except IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Happy Love Bracers
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
Slot: WRIST
AC: 1
Focus: Reagent Conservation I
WT: 4.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL except IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Plate
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):40, 100, 40
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:unknown
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 07:21:03
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 10
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Hukulk's Love

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Neriak Third Gate
NPC Name
Ratraz

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Grobb
Quest Name
Hukulk's Love

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Neriak Third Gate

# Jun 14 2017 at 9:52 AM Rating: Decent

11 posts
There should be a quest at the Temple of Marr to repatriate these bracers from the big bad trolls who don't know the true meaning of the word.
▲ Page top
Had to have it
QuoteReply
# May 05 2004 at 8:05 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591788742148
7 posts
I got this item about 8 months ago, but recently found it in one of my packs in the bank. I just love the name, and was worth the extra faction work I had to do to get myself back to where I started. I think the graphic for it should have them tie-dyed, but go figure.
▲ Page top
Happy Love in Neriak?
QuoteReply
# Apr 29 2004 at 5:05 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591793697396
View User Forum
383 posts
C'Mon guys. Happy Love Bracers from the city dedicated to the God of Hate!?! Something like this should come from a more loving place or at least from a race aligned with Erollisi Marr.

# Jul 05 2004 at 4:30 PM Rating: Good

▲ Page top
The Bracer
QuoteReply
# May 22 2003 at 6:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760410150
2 posts
Do you know how good this is for a 20+ SK? When you hit 20 its a 100% chance that the reagent for your spell is going to be null. In other words I wont need any bone chips when Iam 20 and it only weighs 4 pounds IMO is better then trying to hunt for bone chips all the time. Just wear when summoning your pet.
▲ Page top
RE: The Bracer
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2004 at 4:01 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591795839388
View User Forum
177 posts
a: doesn't work on spells above 20
b: chance to save reagent is only 15%. so, most
of the time, you will still need bc's.

Edited, Sat Feb 21 04:02:21 2004
▲ Page top
Still RC I
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2003 at 11:01 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591785827847
6 posts
I went and killed Ratraz myself and this is still Reagent Conservation I as of today.
▲ Page top
got it in Neriak
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2002 at 5:03 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759555970
18 posts
Ok, dont mean to sound i know more than u knowish but i got this with my NEC off a troll in Neriak foriegn quarter that somebody killed. Pretty cool just wish it worked a little more often could really save some cash not having to buy spell components all the time.

BTW i also got a no drop troll head. Anyone know WTF this is for.

Thanks

Corneye Brawontrout
26 HUMAN WAR

Elarythia Carcinogen
28 DE NEC

Karana Server
▲ Page top
RE: got it in Neriak
QuoteReply
# Apr 27 2003 at 10:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788742148
7 posts
Killed Rat troll the other day so I could get my own happy love bracer. Just the novelty of the name alone made it worthwhile. I actually ended up killing Rat twice. Once to finish the quest for the helm, and a second time so I could keep the happy love bracers instead of turning them in. I should also say that my faction went way south with the Dark Bargainers. None of them would sell or buy from me after killing Rat twice. I ended up having to do the red wine quest in neriak to up my faction. Along with that, I had to have a friend invis me *after* entering into trade window with the guy in the library. Took over 64 stacks of red wine, but I now con ally to them, so all is well.

Bazlan
50 Troll Shaman
Mith Mar

Edited, Sun Apr 27 10:58:34 2003
▲ Page top
Happy loooooove.....
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2002 at 12:24 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591782558779
1,237 posts
Oh c'mon! Who cares about what they can do? What about the novelty of being able to wear "Happy Love" anythings! They need to make a whole suit of this armor, so far as I'm concerned. I'd ROCK as the Happy Love DE Shadowknight!

PS - Am I alone, or wouldn't Frogloks make kick@$$ PC's?

Honestly...
QuoteReply
# Aug 27 2002 at 2:36 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592345575338
View User Forum
Scholar
21 posts
I highly doubt that this would ever be changed to be Extended Range III. Think about it. There are no other items that are Focus III that are obtainable via quest or at Lvl 10.

More than likely, this item will forever remain Reagent Conservation I. Sorry to burst people's bubbles.

My only question is how and who would have submitted it as Extended Range III? The beginning letters are too far apart to be a pull down whoops, but that doesn't mean the index numbers are too far apart from each other in the dB.

Tylendol Moredhel
60th Sorcerer
Prexus
▲ Page top
RE: Honestly...
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2002 at 7:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592341527836
Scholar
188 posts
When focus effects were first placed on items they screwed up, they looked like they were put on randomly. The next day they fixed it and made the focus more in tune to the item.

#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 19 2002 at 12:08 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i use to use these up until 15. People would always want to trade for them just bcuz of the graphic (green plate) when i was lv 3 or so i saw this dark elf necro soloin some troll at lv 13. I then stood by his corpse and looted these. (i had no use for his head)
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 27 2001 at 7:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) For the zerg!!!
#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 24 2001 at 6:49 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) this quest is a stupid waste of time. even if the gay freaking bracer has a funny name why would you want it taking up inventory space, and the helm doesn't look all that cool anyways (that would be the only reason to get it cuz the ac sux and who gives flying **** about the stat bonus when by the level you could get it you should be able to get a better one?). this quest isn't worth doing at all, not for a twink and definatly not for your main.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 31 2001 at 6:40 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) For Aiur!
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 07 2002 at 8:45 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Antaro Adun Executor!

Scholar
118 posts
First, these drop off of Ratraz in Neriak 3rd Gate, second they are Lore....meaning can only have 1. I have a 54 Halfling Druid, that i have wearing this item...LOL, when a PKer is around, i bag up my stuff except for this wonderful bracer as an insult (Pkers are not happy nor loved)
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 03 2001 at 6:15 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) what's the quest you DA's? noone cares about why you want these or the definition of a quest item
bah
QuoteReply
# May 27 2001 at 4:58 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
bah... some of you guys take yourselves too seriously. its for a quest.. and i looked these up because i thought it wouuld be cool to have bracers called "happy love"... call me a fool but i think its funny, and if you cant take something as small as that as a joke then you shouldnt be playing a game were you interact with so many people. and like that guy said, they are USED IN A QUEST... how many quest items do you see that have good enough stats taht you actually want to wear them? the idea is to turn them in for somehtng better so you DONT have to wear them. *sigh*
Savasha-
get a sense of humor and stop taking yourself so seriously... thats the kind of thing a n00b in CB would say
